headline: How Adobe Stock's Cash Generation Changes The AI Debate
summary: With the market focused on competitive threats and a strategic pivot, one overlooked number reveals the powerful financial engine that gives Adobe room to maneuver.

headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks to Target This Week and 1 We Avoid
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.
